subject: External monitor not detected after dock reconnect
description: Laptop on USB-C dock; external display worked yesterday; today only built-in screen lights up.

ts_steps.title: Reseat connections
ts_steps.action: Disconnect dock power and USB-C, wait 10s, reconnect direct to Mac first, then expand through dock.

ts_steps.title: Detect displays
ts_steps.action: System Settings → Displays — hold Option and click Detect Displays; try mirror vs extend.

ts_steps.title: Safe resolution
ts_steps.action: Choose scaled resolution or default for external display; avoid unsupported refresh rates on cheap adapters.

internal_information: Cable/adapter failure common; EDID handshake on cheap dongles flaky. Dock firmware update from vendor if available.
